general.instructionsDescription: These instructions will be applied to all your conversations. Agent-specific instructions take higher priority.
general.instructionsPlaceholder: E.g., Always respond in Chinese. Prefer concise answers...
general.chooseAvatarDescription: Pick a color, then choose an icon — or upload your own image.
general.avatarPreviewHint: Pick a color and icon below.
general.invalidImageFormat: Invalid image format. Supported: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP
general.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 2 characters
general.personalizationDescription: Re-run the setup wizard to update your role, projects, and AI preferences.

models.title: Model Providers
models.description: Configure LLM providers. General model is used for reasoning and planning; Fast model for DAG step execution.
models.noProvidersHint: Add a provider to override the environment variable defaults.
models.generalModelDesc: Used for ReAct reasoning, DAG planning, and analysis
models.fastModelDesc: Used for DAG step execution (falls back to General if not set)
models.noProvidersAvailable: No providers available. Add a provider first.
models.compatibilityNotice: Only OpenAI-compatible APIs are supported. For Anthropic or other providers, use their OpenAI-compatible endpoint and API key.
models.apiKeyEditPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep existing key
models.apiKeyEditHint: Leave blank to keep the existing key.
models.nameAndModelRequired: Name and Model Name are required
models.discardDescription: You have unsaved input. Are you sure you want to close?
models.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}". This action cannot be undone.

account.connectedAccountsDescription: Third-party login providers linked to your account.
account.disconnectTooltip: Set a password before disconnecting your only login method.
account.disconnectConfirmDescription: This will unlink your {provider} account. You can reconnect it later from the settings page.
account.connectFailed: Failed to initiate OAuth connection. Please try again.
account.disconnectFailed: Failed to disconnect provider. Please try again.
account.bindErrorEmailMismatch: OAuth account email does not match your account email. Binding requires matching emails.
account.bindErrorAlreadyBound: This OAuth account is already bound to another user.
account.bindErrorAlreadyConnected: You already have a connection for this provider.
account.emailDescription: Update the email address associated with your account.
account.emailRequired: Email is required and cannot be empty.
account.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
account.emailUpdateFailed: Failed to update email. Please try again.
account.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.
account.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters.
account.passwordChangeFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.
account.setPasswordDescription: Your account uses OAuth login only. Set a password to enable email/password login and allow disconnecting OAuth providers.
account.passwordSetFailed: Failed to set password. Please try again.
account.resetCodeSent: A verification code has been sent to {email}
account.resetPasswordFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
account.deleteAccountUnavailable: Account deletion is not yet available.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize how the app looks on your device.
